name: Autumn Dusk Dwelling School
lore: Floating on the river is a boarding school for those who want to sharpen their crafts, upon giving Tea to your new Shizun you will have access to all that the school has to offer, Lecture Hall, Potions/Alchemy, Herbology and Art classrooms, a sparring area to work those muscles to give the mind a break. the kitchens are well stocked and connected to a large dining hall ready for all occasions, the 3 level dormitories have many bedding options and a leisure and study area on the roof and rest those aching bones in the outdoor baths after the day is done.... or maybe climb the stairs and ready yourselves for your trails.   (im Terribly Slack at posting my own stuff)

name: My first house
lore:
Hi all, may i present to you JY Onsen Villa. Took me more than week to complete it. This is the first actual house that i build as previously my lakeside house is a diagram from a friend and I just added the bridge and martial training hall next to it. My journey started 3 weeks ago and I am still a beginner and I am learning from the mistake and errors.  It has flaws but i am learning and strive to improve. I spend a lot of times aligning, modifying, correcting, decorating, discarding and correcting, decorating the items. I get some ideas and inspiration from friends works and thanks to them I learned and gave me new ideas to progress.

I am also available for hire if you are interest to have some builds in your world map. My UID is 4042165548 can dm or in game. Thank you and hope my video can inspire some of you to start building. Have a great day ya.  Video link is here : https://drive.google.com/file/d/1P1SKCfqbA94ly74zuJYXhpOG3WXeNUNS/view?usp=drive_link

name: The Palace of Frozen Eternity / Дворец Застывшей Вечности
lore:
In the middle of a dead desert, where the wind sings of eternity, stands a forgotten palace. Caravans are not looking for it, it is not marked on maps. But if you do find him, tread carefully. The water glows golden here, and the fish soar in the sky like stars that have broken loose. Red flowers are burning in the darkness, and the stone people are frozen in worship, prayer, and wonder — as if life had overtaken them for a moment and gone, leaving only a whisper. Welcome to the Palace of Frozen Eternity. Here, every step on the water echoes, and no one has been sitting on the throne... for a very long time.

Посреди мёртвой пустыни, туда, где ветер поёт о вечности, стоит забытый дворец. Его не ищут караваны, его не отмечают на картах. Но если ты всё же найдёшь его — ступай осторожно. Вода здесь светится золотом, а рыбы парят в небе, словно звёзды, сорвавшиеся с цепи. Красные цветы горят во тьме, а каменные люди застыли в поклоне, молитве, удивлении — будто жизнь обогнала их на мгновение и ушла, оставив только шёпот. Добро пожаловать в Дворец Застывшей Вечности. Здесь каждый шаг по воде отзывается эхом, а на троне никто не сидит… уже очень давно.

name: A Dance Among the Lanterns
lore:
Building is probably one of my favorite things to do in the game. I enjoy working on projects of all sizes, from small corners to entire environments... But more than anything, I love giving them a purpose and a story that feels connected to the game's lore. So today, I'd like to humbly share one of my favorite creations, along with the story behind it. ♥️

(I also prepared a shortened English version of the original story with a little help from ChatGPT, so it wouldn't turn into an endless wall of text. 😄)

> Deep within the Sparkling Abyss, long before their names became forgotten legends, Li Zuo and Liu Qingyi lived a simple and happy life. Everything changed when the physician Sun Buqi subjected Qingyi to forbidden experiments. She survived, but at the cost of a poisoned immortality that slowly eroded her soul while leaving her body untouched.
> 
> Knowing that she would eventually lose the very qualities that made her human, Qingyi wished to accept her fate and leave the world before she became incapable of love or compassion. Unable to let her go, Li Zuo chose another path. Deep within the Abyss, he built a refuge for her: lanterns hanging like stars, pavilions filled with paintings and books, floating gardens, and research halls, all created in the hope of giving her one final spring and perhaps a cure.
> 
> For years, they studied the curse together. Li Zuo traveled the world to bring her its wonders, while Qingyi fought to preserve what remained of her humanity. Yet some wounds cannot be healed.
> 
> When Qingyi realized that her soul was truly beginning to fade, she chose to depart while she could still love the world. On the night of her passing, the lanterns of the Abyss burned until dawn, and it is said that a white deer appeared to guide her spirit beyond the mortal realm.
> 
> After her death, Li Zuo abandoned both hope and research. He built his own tomb in the depths of the Abyss and entrusted its protection to the King of Nothingness. Little by little, he turned away from the world of the living, consumed by a grief so profound that it left no room for light.
> 
> Yet even now, on certain nights, lanterns still drift around a stone flower standing amid the dark waters. The elders claim that a lone figure can sometimes be seen dancing among the floating lights, as though the memories of Liu Qingyi refuse to fade away.
